---
title: "StormersChat — Data Pipeline"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
start_time <- Sys.time()
```

```{r packages}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
required_pkgs <- c("DBI", "RPostgres", "httr2", "dplyr", "purrr",
                   "tibble", "glue", "dotenv", "knitr")
invisible(lapply(required_pkgs, function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg, quiet = TRUE)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}))
```

```{r credentials}
# Load .env locally; on Posit Connect these come from the Vars panel
local_env <- "backend/.env"
if (file.exists(local_env)) dotenv::load_dot_env(local_env)

BASE_URL    <- Sys.getenv("OVAL_INSIGHTS_BASE_URL", "https://api.rugbyviz.com/rugby/v1")
USERNAME    <- Sys.getenv("OVAL_INSIGHTS_USERNAME")
PASSWORD    <- Sys.getenv("OVAL_INSIGHTS_PASSWORD")
URC_ID      <- as.integer(Sys.getenv("OVAL_URC_COMP_ID",           "1068"))
CHAMPS_ID   <- as.integer(Sys.getenv("OVAL_CHAMPIONS_CUP_COMP_ID", "1008"))
SEASON_ID   <- as.integer(Sys.getenv("OVAL_CURRENT_SEASON_ID",     "202501"))
STORMERS_ID <- as.integer(Sys.getenv("OVAL_STORMERS_TEAM_ID",      "3994"))

stopifnot(
  "OVAL_INSIGHTS_USERNAME not set" = nchar(USERNAME) > 0,
  "OVAL_INSIGHTS_PASSWORD not set" = nchar(PASSWORD) > 0
)
```

```{r db_connect}
con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  host     = Sys.getenv("PG_HOST"),
  port     = as.integer(Sys.getenv("PG_PORT", "5432")),
  dbname   = Sys.getenv("PG_DBNAME"),
  user     = Sys.getenv("PG_USER"),
  password = Sys.getenv("PG_PASSWORD")
)
```

```{r helpers}
# ── API helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
oval_get <- function(endpoint, quiet = TRUE) {
  url <- paste0(BASE_URL, endpoint)
  tryCatch({
    request(url) |>
      req_auth_basic(USERNAME, PASSWORD) |>
      req_headers(Accept = "application/json") |>
      req_timeout(30) |>
      req_retry(max_tries = 3, backoff = ~ 2) |>
      req_perform() |>
      resp_body_json(simplifyVector = FALSE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(glue("  ✗ Failed: {endpoint} — {e$message}"))
    NULL
  })
}

# ── Type-safe extractors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
safe_int <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) NA_integer_ else as.integer(x[[1]])
safe_chr <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) NA_character_ else as.character(x[[1]])
safe_dbl <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) NA_real_     else as.double(x[[1]])
safe_lgl <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) NA_integer_  else as.integer(as.logical(x[[1]]))
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

# ── Row count tracker ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
counts <- list()
log_count <- function(table, n_new, n_total) {
  counts[[table]] <<- list(new = n_new, total = n_total)
  message(glue("  ✓ {table}: +{n_new} new rows  ({n_total} total)"))
}

table_row_count <- function(con, table_name) {
  table_id <- dbQuoteIdentifier(con, table_name)
  dbGetQuery(con, glue("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM {table_id}"))$n[[1]]
}

# ── DB write helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Use for tables that have FK children pointing to them (e.g. matches):
# writes via INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE so the table is never dropped.
upsert_table <- function(con, table_name, df, pk_col) {
  if (ncol(df) == 0) {
    stop(glue("Refusing to upsert {table_name}: data frame has no columns. Check the upstream API response shape."))
  }
  tmp <- paste0(table_name, "_tmp_", sample(1000:9999, 1))
  dbWriteTable(con, tmp, df, temporary = TRUE, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)
  cols <- paste(names(df), collapse = ", ")
  upd  <- paste(
    setdiff(names(df), pk_col),
    paste0("EXCLUDED.", setdiff(names(df), pk_col)),
    sep  = " = ", collapse = ", "
  )
  dbExecute(con, glue(
    "INSERT INTO {table_name} ({cols}) SELECT {cols} FROM {tmp} ",
    "ON CONFLICT ({pk_col}) DO UPDATE SET {upd}"
  ))
  dbExecute(con, glue("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {tmp}"))
  invisible(NULL)
}

# Use for season-level refresh tables with no FK children pointing to them:
# TRUNCATE empties the table without touching the schema or constraints.
refresh_table <- function(con, table_name, df) {
  if (ncol(df) == 0) {
    stop(glue("Refusing to refresh {table_name}: data frame has no columns. Check the upstream API response shape before truncating the table."))
  }
  dbExecute(con, glue("TRUNCATE TABLE {table_name}"))
  if (nrow(df) > 0) dbAppendTable(con, table_name, df)
  invisible(NULL)
}

ensure_text_column <- function(con, table_name, column_name) {
  col_info <- dbGetQuery(
    con,
    glue(
      "SELECT data_type
       FROM information_schema.columns
       WHERE table_schema = current_schema()
         AND table_name = {dbQuoteString(con, table_name)}
         AND column_name = {dbQuoteString(con, column_name)}"
    )
  )
  if (nrow(col_info) == 0) {
    warning(glue("Column {table_name}.{column_name} not found in current schema."))
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }
  if (identical(col_info$data_type[[1]], "text")) return(invisible(FALSE))

  table_id  <- dbQuoteIdentifier(con, table_name)
  column_id <- dbQuoteIdentifier(con, column_name)
  message(glue("  ! Altering {table_name}.{column_name} to TEXT to match the pipeline schema"))
  dbExecute(
    con,
    glue("ALTER TABLE {table_id} ALTER COLUMN {column_id} TYPE TEXT USING {column_id}::text")
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}

# Fresh DB connection — call this to reconnect after long API loops
pg_connect <- function() {
  dbConnect(
    RPostgres::Postgres(),
    host     = Sys.getenv("PG_HOST"),
    port     = as.integer(Sys.getenv("PG_PORT", "5432")),
    dbname   = Sys.getenv("PG_DBNAME"),
    user     = Sys.getenv("PG_USER"),
    password = Sys.getenv("PG_PASSWORD")
  )
}
```

## 1. Matches

```{r fetch_matches}
fetch_matches <- function(comp_id, comp_name) {
  raw <- oval_get(glue("/match/search?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}"))
  if (is.null(raw)) return(tibble())
  map_dfr(raw, function(m) {
    venue_country_val <- if (is.list(m$venue$country)) safe_chr(m$venue$country$name)
                         else safe_chr(m$venue$country)
    tibble(
      match_id          = safe_int(m$id),
      date_time         = safe_chr(m$dateTime),
      season_id         = safe_int(m$season$id),
      season_name       = safe_chr(m$season$name),
      competition_id    = comp_id,
      competition       = comp_name,
      round             = safe_int(m$round),
      match_status      = safe_chr(m$matchStatus),
      finalised         = safe_lgl(m$finalised),
      home_team_id      = safe_int(m$homeTeam$id),
      home_team         = safe_chr(m$homeTeam$name),
      home_team_short   = safe_chr(m$homeTeam$shortName),
      home_team_abbr    = safe_chr(m$homeTeam$abbreviatedName),
      home_score_ht     = safe_int(m$homeTeam$score$htScore),
      home_score_ft     = safe_int(m$homeTeam$score$finalScore),
      away_team_id      = safe_int(m$awayTeam$id),
      away_team         = safe_chr(m$awayTeam$name),
      away_team_short   = safe_chr(m$awayTeam$shortName),
      away_team_abbr    = safe_chr(m$awayTeam$abbreviatedName),
      away_score_ht     = safe_int(m$awayTeam$score$htScore),
      away_score_ft     = safe_int(m$awayTeam$score$finalScore),
      winner_team_id    = safe_int(m$matchWinner),
      venue             = safe_chr(m$venue$name),
      venue_id          = safe_int(m$venue$id),
      venue_country     = venue_country_val,
      venue_timezone    = safe_chr(m$venue$timezone),
      venue_floodlit    = safe_lgl(m$venue$floodlit),
      neutral_venue     = safe_lgl(m$venue$neutralVenue),
      attendance        = safe_int(m$attendance)
    )
  })
}

matches <- bind_rows(
  fetch_matches(URC_ID,    "United Rugby Championship"),
  fetch_matches(CHAMPS_ID, "European Rugby Champions Cup")
)

# Upsert matches table without dropping the FK parent
upsert_table(con, "matches", matches, "match_id")
log_count("matches", nrow(matches), table_row_count(con, "matches"))

finalised_ids     <- matches$match_id[matches$finalised == 1 & !is.na(matches$finalised)]
stormers_match_ids <- matches$match_id[
  (matches$home_team_id == STORMERS_ID | matches$away_team_id == STORMERS_ID) &
    matches$finalised == 1 & !is.na(matches$finalised)
]
```

## 2. Match-Level Stats (incremental)

```{r new_match_ids}
# Find which finalised matches are NOT yet in the DB
existing_ids <- tryCatch(
  dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT DISTINCT match_id FROM player_match_stats")$match_id,
  error = function(e) integer(0)
)
new_ids <- setdiff(finalised_ids, existing_ids)
message(glue("  Finalised: {length(finalised_ids)}  |  Already loaded: {length(existing_ids)}  |  New: {length(new_ids)}"))
```

```{r extract_fns}
extract_player_stats <- function(p, match_id, team_id, team_name, is_home) {
  s <- p$stats
  tibble(
    match_id = match_id, player_id = safe_int(p$id), player_name = safe_chr(p$name),
    team_id = team_id, team_name = team_name, is_home_team = as.integer(is_home),
    position_id = safe_int(p$position$id), position_name = safe_chr(p$position$name),
    shirt_number = safe_int(p$position$shirtNumber),
    minutes_played = safe_int(s$scoring$minutesPlayed),
    minutes_played_first_half = safe_int(s$scoring$minutesPlayedFirstHalf),
    minutes_played_second_half = safe_int(s$scoring$minutesPlayedSecondHalf),
    tries_scored = safe_int(s$scoring$tryScored), points_scored = safe_int(s$scoring$points),
    conversions_made = safe_int(s$scoring$conversion), penalties_made = safe_int(s$scoring$penaltyGoal),
    drop_goals_made = safe_int(s$scoring$dropGoal),
    penalties_conceded = safe_int(s$discipline$penaltyConceded),
    yellow_cards = safe_int(s$discipline$yellowCard), red_cards = safe_int(s$discipline$redCard),
    carries = safe_int(s$attack$carries), metres_made = safe_int(s$attack$metresMade),
    passes = safe_int(s$attack$passes), defenders_beaten = safe_int(s$attack$defenderBeaten),
    crossed_gainline = safe_int(s$attack$crossedGainline),
    failed_gainline = safe_int(s$attack$failedGainline),
    turnovers_conceded = safe_int(s$attack$totalTurnovers),
    post_contact_metres = safe_int(s$attack$postContactMetres),
    try_assists = safe_int(s$attack$tryAssist), break_assists = safe_int(s$attack$breakAssist),
    tackles_made = safe_int(s$defence$totalSuccessfulTackles),
    tackles_missed = safe_int(s$defence$totalUnsuccessfulTackles),
    total_tackles_attempted = safe_int(s$defence$totalAttemptedTackles),
    tackle_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$defence$percentTackleMade),
    turnovers_won = safe_int(s$defence$turnoverWon),
    jackals = safe_int(s$defence$jackalPenaltyWon),
    dominant_tackles = safe_int(s$defence$dominantTackleContact),
    lineout_throws_won = safe_int(s$lineout$lineoutThrowsWon),
    lineout_throws_lost = safe_int(s$lineout$lineoutLost),
    lineout_won_clean = safe_int(s$lineout$wonClean), lineout_won_other = safe_int(s$lineout$wonOther),
    throw_front = safe_int(s$lineout$throwFront), throw_middle = safe_int(s$lineout$throwMiddle),
    throw_back = safe_int(s$lineout$throwBack),
    kicks_in_play = safe_int(s$kicking$kicksInPlay), kick_metres = safe_int(s$kicking$kickMetres),
    territorial_kicks = safe_int(s$kicking$territorial),
    ruck_entries_attacking = safe_int(s$rucks$attackingRuckEntries),
    ruck_entries_defensive = safe_int(s$rucks$defensiveRuckEntries),
    ruck_entries_total = safe_int(s$rucks$totalRuckEntries), ruck_nuisance = safe_int(s$rucks$nuisance),
    scrum_involvement_total = safe_int(s$scrum$totalScrumInvolvement),
    scrum_won_total = safe_int(s$scrum$attackScrumTotalWon),
    scrum_won_penalty = safe_int(s$scrum$attackScrumWonPenalty),
    scrum_won_outright = safe_int(s$scrum$attackScrumWonOutright),
    defensive_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$defensiveCatch),
    defensive_catch_success = safe_int(s$ballReception$defensiveCatchSuccess),
    restart_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$restartCatch),
    restart_catch_success = safe_int(s$ballReception$restartCatchSuccess)
  )
}

extract_team_stats <- function(team_data, match_id, is_home) {
  t <- team_data$team
  s <- team_data$teamStats
  if (is.null(s)) return(tibble())
  lineout_won  <- safe_int(s$lineout$lineoutThrowsWon)
  lineout_lost <- safe_int(s$lineout$lineoutThrowsLost)
  scrum_won    <- safe_int(s$scrum$scrumsWon)
  scrum_total  <- safe_int(s$scrum$totalScrums)
  tibble(
    match_id = match_id, team_id = safe_int(t$id), team_name = safe_chr(t$name),
    is_home_team = as.integer(is_home),
    carries = safe_int(s$attack$carries), metres_made = safe_int(s$attack$metresMade),
    passes = safe_int(s$attack$passes), defenders_beaten = safe_int(s$attack$defenderBeaten),
    clean_breaks = safe_int(s$attack$cleanBreak),
    crossed_gainline = safe_int(s$attack$crossedGainline),
    failed_gainline = safe_int(s$attack$failedGainline),
    offloads = safe_int(s$attack$offload), post_contact_metres = safe_int(s$attack$postContactMetres),
    try_assists = safe_int(s$attack$tryAssist),
    tries_scored = safe_int(s$scoring$tryScored), points_scored = safe_int(s$scoring$points),
    conversions_made = safe_int(s$scoring$conversion), penalties_made = safe_int(s$scoring$penaltyGoal),
    tackles_made = safe_int(s$defence$totalSuccessfulTackles),
    tackles_missed = safe_int(s$defence$totalUnsuccessfulTackles),
    total_tackles_attempted = safe_int(s$defence$totalAttemptedTackles),
    tackle_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$defence$percentTackleMade),
    turnovers_won = safe_int(s$defence$turnoverWon),
    dominant_tackles = safe_int(s$defence$dominantTackleContact),
    lineout_throws_won = lineout_won, lineout_throws_lost = lineout_lost,
    lineout_success_pct = if (!is.na(lineout_won) && !is.na(lineout_lost) && (lineout_won + lineout_lost) > 0)
                            round(lineout_won * 100 / (lineout_won + lineout_lost), 1)
                          else safe_dbl(s$lineout$percentLineoutsWon),
    scrum_won = scrum_won,
    scrum_lost = if (!is.na(scrum_total) && !is.na(scrum_won)) as.integer(scrum_total - scrum_won) else NA_integer_,
    scrum_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$scrum$percentScrumsWon),
    kicks_in_play = safe_int(s$kicking$kicksInPlay), kick_metres = safe_int(s$kicking$kickMetres),
    penalties_conceded = safe_int(s$discipline$penaltyConceded),
    rucks_won = safe_int(s$possession$numRucksWon), rucks_lost = safe_int(s$possession$numRucksLost),
    mauls_won = safe_int(s$possession$maulsWon), mauls_lost = safe_int(s$possession$maulsLost),
    maul_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentMaulsWon),
    visits_to_22 = safe_int(s$possession$numVisitsTo22),
    points_from_22_visits = safe_int(s$possession$pointsFromVisitsTo22),
    possession_pct = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentPossession),
    possession_pct_fh = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentPossessionFirstHalf),
    possession_pct_sh = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentPossessionSecondHalf),
    territory_pct = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentTerritory),
    territory_pct_fh = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentTerritoryFirstHalf),
    territory_pct_sh = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentTerritorySecondHalf),
    total_restarts = safe_int(s$restart$totalRestarts),
    restarts_retained = safe_int(s$restart$restartsRetained),
    restarts_50m = safe_int(s$restart$restart50m),
    restarts_goal_line = safe_int(s$restart$restartGoalLine),
    restart_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$restart$percentRestartsRetained),
    attacking_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$attackingCatch),
    attacking_catch_success = safe_int(s$ballReception$attackingCatchSuccess),
    defensive_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$defensiveCatch),
    defensive_catch_success = safe_int(s$ballReception$defensiveCatchSuccess),
    restart_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$restartCatch),
    restart_catch_success = safe_int(s$ballReception$restartCatchSuccess),
    aerial_contests = safe_int(s$ballReception$aerialContest),
    aerial_contests_won = safe_int(s$ballReception$aerialContestWon),
    aerial_contest_pct = safe_dbl(s$ballReception$percentAerialContestWon)
  )
}
```

```{r fetch_match_stats}
if (length(new_ids) > 0) {
  n_pms <- 0L; n_mts <- 0L; n_evt <- 0L; n_qtrs <- 0L

  # Older DB versions may still have match_events.time typed as numeric.
  # Rugby injury-time strings such as "80+1" must be stored as text.
  ensure_text_column(con, "match_events", "time")

  start_pms  <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "player_match_stats"), error = function(e) 0L)
  start_mts  <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_team_stats"),   error = function(e) 0L)
  start_evt  <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_events"),       error = function(e) 0L)
  start_qtrs <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_quarters"),     error = function(e) 0L)

  # Load existing player IDs once — updated in-memory as we insert new players
  known_player_ids <- tryCatch(
    dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT player_id FROM players")$player_id,
    error = function(e) integer(0)
  )

  for (mid in new_ids) {
    # ── Match stats (players + teams) — write immediately ─────────────────────
    raw <- oval_get(glue("/matchstats/{mid}"))
    if (!is.null(raw)) {
      pms_rows <- list(); mts_rows <- list(); match_player_rows <- list()
      for (side in list(list(data = raw$homeTeam, is_home = TRUE),
                        list(data = raw$awayTeam, is_home = FALSE))) {
        if (is.null(side$data)) next
        tid   <- safe_int(side$data$team$id)
        tname <- safe_chr(side$data$team$name)
        tryCatch(
          mts_rows[[length(mts_rows) + 1]] <- extract_team_stats(side$data, mid, side$is_home),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
        for (p in side$data$players) {
          match_player_rows[[length(match_player_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
            player_id  = safe_int(p$id), name = safe_chr(p$name),
            known_name = safe_chr(p$knownName), first_name = safe_chr(p$firstName),
            last_name  = safe_chr(p$lastName)
          )
          tryCatch(
            pms_rows[[length(pms_rows) + 1]] <-
              extract_player_stats(p, mid, tid, tname, side$is_home),
            error = function(e) NULL
          )
        }
      }
      # ── Write players FIRST (FK parent of player_match_stats) ───────────────
      match_players <- if (length(match_player_rows) > 0) {
        bind_rows(match_player_rows) |> distinct(player_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
      } else {
        tibble(
          player_id = integer(),
          name = character(),
          known_name = character(),
          first_name = character(),
          last_name = character()
        )
      }
      truly_new <- match_players |> filter(!player_id %in% known_player_ids)
      if (nrow(truly_new) > 0) {
        dbAppendTable(con, "players", truly_new)
        known_player_ids <- c(known_player_ids, truly_new$player_id)
      }
      # ── Then write player_match_stats and match_team_stats ───────────────────
      match_pms <- bind_rows(pms_rows)
      match_mts <- bind_rows(mts_rows)
      if (nrow(match_pms) > 0) { dbAppendTable(con, "player_match_stats", match_pms); n_pms <- n_pms + nrow(match_pms) }
      if (nrow(match_mts) > 0) { dbAppendTable(con, "match_team_stats",   match_mts); n_mts <- n_mts + nrow(match_mts) }
    }

    # ── Match events — write immediately ──────────────────────────────────────
    ev_raw <- oval_get(glue("/matchevents/{mid}"))
    if (!is.null(ev_raw)) {
      events_raw <- if (!is.null(ev_raw$events)) ev_raw$events else ev_raw
      if (is.list(events_raw) && length(events_raw) > 0) {
        rows <- map_dfr(events_raw, function(e) {
          period_val <- if (!is.null(e$period) && is.list(e$period)) e$period$name else e$period
          props_str  <- if (!is.null(e$properties) && length(e$properties) > 0)
            paste(sapply(e$properties, function(p) paste0(
              if (!is.null(p$name)) as.character(p$name) else "",
              "=",
              if (!is.null(p$value)) as.character(p$value) else ""
            )), collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
          tibble(
            match_id = mid, event_id = safe_int(e$id),
            event_type = safe_chr(e$type$name), event_type_id = safe_int(e$type$id),
            time = safe_chr(e$time), minute = safe_int(e$minute), second = safe_int(e$second),
            period = safe_chr(period_val),
            team_id = safe_int(e$team$id), team_name = safe_chr(e$team$name),
            player_id = safe_int(e$player$id), player_name = safe_chr(e$player$name),
            score_home = safe_int(e$homeScore), score_away = safe_int(e$awayScore),
            start_x = safe_dbl(e$startX), start_y = safe_dbl(e$startY),
            end_x = safe_dbl(e$endX), end_y = safe_dbl(e$endY),
            direction = safe_chr(e$direction), properties = props_str,
            is_deleted = safe_lgl(e$isDeleted),
            timestamp = safe_chr(e$timestamp), last_modified = safe_chr(e$lastModified)
          )
        })
        if (nrow(rows) > 0) { dbAppendTable(con, "match_events", rows); n_evt <- n_evt + nrow(rows) }
      }
    }

    # ── Match quarters — write immediately ────────────────────────────────────
    for (qtr in c("q1", "q2", "q3", "q4")) {
      q_raw <- oval_get(glue("/matchquarters/{mid}?quarter={qtr}"))
      if (is.null(q_raw)) next
      qtr_key   <- paste0("stats", toupper(substring(qtr, 1, 1)), substring(qtr, 2))
      stats_raw <- q_raw[[qtr_key]]
      if (is.null(stats_raw) || length(stats_raw) == 0) next
      rows <- map_dfr(stats_raw, function(s) tibble(
        match_id = mid, quarter = qtr,
        home_team_id = safe_int(q_raw$homeTeam$id), home_team_name = safe_chr(q_raw$homeTeam$name),
        away_team_id = safe_int(q_raw$awayTeam$id), away_team_name = safe_chr(q_raw$awayTeam$name),
        stat_key = safe_chr(s$key), stat_label = safe_chr(s$label),
        home_value = safe_dbl(s$homeValue), away_value = safe_dbl(s$awayValue),
        home_share_pct = safe_dbl(s$homeMatchSharePercentage),
        away_share_pct = safe_dbl(s$awayMatchSharePercentage)
      ))
      if (nrow(rows) > 0) { dbAppendTable(con, "match_quarters", rows); n_qtrs <- n_qtrs + nrow(rows) }
    }
    message(glue("  ✓ match {mid}"))
  }

  end_pms  <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "player_match_stats"), error = function(e) start_pms + n_pms)
  end_mts  <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_team_stats"),   error = function(e) start_mts + n_mts)
  end_evt  <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_events"),       error = function(e) start_evt + n_evt)
  end_qtrs <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_quarters"),     error = function(e) start_qtrs + n_qtrs)

  if (end_pms  < start_pms  + n_pms)  warning("player_match_stats count is lower than expected after append.")
  if (end_mts  < start_mts  + n_mts)  warning("match_team_stats count is lower than expected after append.")
  if (end_evt  < start_evt  + n_evt)  warning("match_events count is lower than expected after append.")
  if (end_qtrs < start_qtrs + n_qtrs) warning("match_quarters count is lower than expected after append.")

  log_count("player_match_stats", n_pms, end_pms)
  log_count("match_team_stats",   n_mts, end_mts)
  log_count("match_events",       n_evt, end_evt)
  log_count("match_quarters",     n_qtrs, end_qtrs)

} else {
  log_count("player_match_stats", 0L, tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "player_match_stats"), error = function(e) 0L))
  log_count("match_team_stats",   0L, tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_team_stats"),   error = function(e) 0L))
  log_count("match_events",       0L, tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_events"),       error = function(e) 0L))
  log_count("match_quarters",     0L, tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "match_quarters"),     error = function(e) 0L))
  message("  ✓ No new matches to process")
}
```

## 3. Head-to-Head (Stormers matches, incremental)

```{r fetch_h2h}
existing_h2h <- tryCatch(
  dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT match_id FROM head_to_head")$match_id,
  error = function(e) integer(0)
)
new_h2h_ids <- setdiff(stormers_match_ids, existing_h2h)

if (length(new_h2h_ids) > 0) {
  n_h2h <- 0L
  start_h2h <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "head_to_head"), error = function(e) 0L)
  for (mid in new_h2h_ids) {
    raw <- oval_get(glue("/headtohead/{mid}"))
    if (is.null(raw)) next
    h2h  <- raw$headToHeadStats
    home <- raw$teams$homeTeam
    away <- raw$teams$awayTeam
    if (is.null(h2h)) next
    last5_str <- tryCatch({
      m5 <- h2h$last5Matches
      if (is.null(m5) || length(m5) == 0) NA_character_
      else paste(sapply(m5, function(x) if (is.list(x))
        paste(names(x), unlist(x), sep="=", collapse=";") else as.character(x)), collapse=" | ")
    }, error = function(e) NA_character_)
    form_str <- tryCatch({
      f <- h2h$form
      if (is.null(f)) NA_character_ else if (is.character(f)) f else paste(unlist(f), collapse="")
    }, error = function(e) NA_character_)
    row <- tibble(
      match_id = mid,
      home_team_id = safe_int(home$id), home_team_name = safe_chr(home$name),
      away_team_id = safe_int(away$id), away_team_name = safe_chr(away$name),
      total_matches = safe_int(h2h$totalMatches),
      home_wins = safe_int(h2h$homeTeamWins), away_wins = safe_int(h2h$awayTeamWins),
      draws = safe_int(h2h$draws),
      home_win_pct = safe_dbl(h2h$homeTeamWinPercentage),
      away_win_pct = safe_dbl(h2h$awayTeamWinPercentage),
      draw_pct = safe_dbl(h2h$drawPercentage),
      biggest_win_margin = safe_int(h2h$biggestWinMargin),
      wins_at_venue = safe_int(h2h$winsAtVenue), neutral_wins = safe_int(h2h$neutralWins),
      total_points_scored = safe_int(h2h$totalPointsScored),
      total_tries_scored = safe_int(h2h$totalTriesScored),
      last_5_matches = last5_str, form = form_str
    )
    dbAppendTable(con, "head_to_head", row)
    n_h2h <- n_h2h + 1L
  }
  end_h2h <- tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "head_to_head"), error = function(e) start_h2h + n_h2h)
  if (end_h2h < start_h2h + n_h2h) warning("head_to_head count is lower than expected after append.")
  log_count("head_to_head", n_h2h, end_h2h)
} else {
  log_count("head_to_head", 0L, tryCatch(table_row_count(con, "head_to_head"), error = function(e) 0L))
  message("  ✓ head_to_head: no new Stormers matches")
}
```

## 4. Season-Level Tables (always refresh)

```{r standings}
fetch_standings <- function(comp_id, comp_name) {
  raw <- oval_get(glue("/standing/search?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}"))
  if (is.null(raw)) return(tibble())
  teams_raw <- raw$groups %||% raw$standings %||% raw
  if (is.null(teams_raw) || length(teams_raw) == 0) return(tibble())
  map_dfr(teams_raw, function(t) tibble(
    competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name, season_id = SEASON_ID,
    position = safe_int(t$position), team_id = safe_int(t$team$id),
    team_name = safe_chr(t$team$name), team_short_name = safe_chr(t$team$shortName),
    played = safe_int(t$played), won = safe_int(t$won), drawn = safe_int(t$drawn),
    lost = safe_int(t$lost), byes = safe_int(t$byes),
    points_for = safe_int(t$pointsFor), points_against = safe_int(t$pointsAgainst),
    point_diff = safe_int(t$pointsDiff), tries_for = safe_int(t$triesFor),
    tries_against = safe_int(t$triesAgainst), bonus_pts_win = safe_int(t$bonus),
    bonus_pts_try = safe_int(t$triesBonus), bonus_pts_loss = safe_int(t$losingBonus),
    league_points = safe_int(t$points),
    points_percentage = safe_dbl(t$pointsPercentage),
    points_scored_pct = safe_dbl(t$pointsScoredPercentage)
  ))
}
standings <- bind_rows(
  fetch_standings(URC_ID, "United Rugby Championship"),
  fetch_standings(CHAMPS_ID, "European Rugby Champions Cup")
)
refresh_table(con, "standings", standings)
log_count("standings", nrow(standings), table_row_count(con, "standings"))
```

```{r round_standings}
max_rounds <- matches |>
  filter(finalised == 1) |>
  group_by(competition_id) |>
  summarise(max_round = max(round, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
max_rounds <- max_rounds |>
  filter(!is.infinite(max_round), !is.na(max_round), max_round > 0)

rs_list <- list()
if (nrow(max_rounds) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(max_rounds))) {
    cid   <- max_rounds$competition_id[i]
    cname <- if (cid == URC_ID) "United Rugby Championship" else "European Rugby Champions Cup"
    for (rnd in seq_len(max_rounds$max_round[i])) {
      raw <- oval_get(glue("/roundstanding/search?compId={cid}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}&round={rnd}"))
      if (is.null(raw)) next
      teams_raw <- raw$groups %||% raw$standings %||% raw
      if (is.null(teams_raw) || length(teams_raw) == 0) next
      rows <- map_dfr(teams_raw, function(t) tibble(
        competition_id = cid, competition = cname, season_id = SEASON_ID, round = rnd,
        position = safe_int(t$position), team_id = safe_int(t$team$id),
        team_name = safe_chr(t$team$name), team_short_name = safe_chr(t$team$shortName),
        played = safe_int(t$played), won = safe_int(t$won), drawn = safe_int(t$drawn),
        lost = safe_int(t$lost), byes = safe_int(t$byes),
        points_for = safe_int(t$pointsFor), points_against = safe_int(t$pointsAgainst),
        point_diff = safe_int(t$pointsDiff), tries_for = safe_int(t$triesFor),
        tries_against = safe_int(t$triesAgainst), bonus_pts_win = safe_int(t$bonus),
        bonus_pts_try = safe_int(t$triesBonus), bonus_pts_loss = safe_int(t$losingBonus),
        league_points = safe_int(t$points), points_percentage = safe_dbl(t$pointsPercentage),
        points_scored_pct = safe_dbl(t$pointsScoredPercentage)
      ))
      if (nrow(rows) > 0) rs_list[[length(rs_list) + 1]] <-
        rows |> distinct(competition_id, round, team_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
    }
  }
}
round_standings <- bind_rows(rs_list)
refresh_table(con, "round_standings", round_standings)
log_count("round_standings", nrow(round_standings), table_row_count(con, "round_standings"))
```

```{r season_stats}
fetch_season_stats <- function(comp_id, comp_name) {
  raw <- oval_get(glue("/seasonstats/search?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}&coverage=performance"))
  if (is.null(raw)) return(tibble())
  teams_raw <- raw$stats %||% raw$groups %||% raw
  if (is.null(teams_raw) || length(teams_raw) == 0) return(tibble())
  map_dfr(teams_raw, function(obj) {
    t <- obj$team; s <- obj$teamStats
    if (is.null(s)) return(tibble())
    tibble(
      competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name, season_id = SEASON_ID,
      team_id = safe_int(t$id), team_name = safe_chr(t$name),
      total_carries = safe_int(s$attack$carries), total_metres_made = safe_int(s$attack$metresMade),
      total_passes = safe_int(s$attack$passes), total_clean_breaks = safe_int(s$attack$cleanBreak),
      total_defenders_beaten = safe_int(s$attack$defenderBeaten),
      total_try_assists = safe_int(s$attack$tryAssist), total_offloads = safe_int(s$attack$offload),
      total_turnovers_conceded = safe_int(s$attack$totalTurnovers),
      total_post_contact_metres = safe_int(s$attack$postContactMetres),
      total_break_assists = safe_int(s$attack$breakAssist),
      total_dominant_carries = safe_int(s$attack$dominantContact),
      total_carry_distance = safe_int(s$attack$carryDistance),
      total_metres_in_contact = safe_int(s$attack$metresInContact),
      total_crossed_gainline = safe_int(s$attack$crossedGainline),
      total_failed_gainline = safe_int(s$attack$failedGainline),
      total_handling_errors = safe_int(s$attack$handlingError),
      total_errors = safe_int(s$attack$errors),
      total_tries = safe_int(s$scoring$tryScored), total_points = safe_int(s$scoring$points),
      total_conversions = safe_int(s$scoring$conversion),
      total_penalties_made = safe_int(s$scoring$penaltyGoal),
      total_missed_conversions = safe_int(s$scoring$missedConversion),
      total_missed_penalties = safe_int(s$scoring$missedPenaltyGoal),
      total_penalty_tries = safe_int(s$scoring$penaltyTry),
      goal_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$scoring$percentGoals),
      total_tackles_made = safe_int(s$defence$totalSuccessfulTackles),
      total_tackles_missed = safe_int(s$defence$totalUnsuccessfulTackles),
      tackle_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$defence$percentTackleMade),
      total_turnovers_won = safe_int(s$defence$turnoverWon),
      lineout_throws_won = safe_int(s$lineout$lineoutThrowsWon),
      lineout_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$lineout$percentLineoutsWon),
      total_kicks_in_play = safe_int(s$kicking$kicksInPlay),
      total_kick_metres = safe_int(s$kicking$kickMetres),
      scrums_won = safe_int(s$scrum$scrumsWon),
      scrum_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$scrum$percentScrumsWon),
      total_penalties_con = safe_int(s$discipline$penaltyConceded),
      total_yellow_cards = safe_int(s$discipline$yellowCard),
      total_red_cards = safe_int(s$discipline$redCard),
      rucks_won = safe_int(s$possession$numRucksWon), rucks_lost = safe_int(s$possession$numRucksLost),
      mauls_won = safe_int(s$possession$maulsWon), mauls_lost = safe_int(s$possession$maulsLost),
      maul_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentMaulsWon),
      visits_to_22 = safe_int(s$possession$numVisitsTo22),
      points_from_22_visits = safe_int(s$possession$pointsFromVisitsTo22),
      possession_pct = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentPossession),
      territory_pct = safe_dbl(s$possession$percentTerritory),
      total_restarts = safe_int(s$restart$totalRestarts),
      restarts_retained = safe_int(s$restart$restartsRetained),
      restart_success_pct = safe_dbl(s$restart$percentRestartsRetained),
      attacking_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$attackingCatch),
      attacking_catch_success = safe_int(s$ballReception$attackingCatchSuccess),
      defensive_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$defensiveCatch),
      restart_catches = safe_int(s$ballReception$restartCatch),
      aerial_contests = safe_int(s$ballReception$aerialContest),
      aerial_contests_won = safe_int(s$ballReception$aerialContestWon),
      aerial_contest_pct = safe_dbl(s$ballReception$percentAerialContestWon),
      ruck_entries_attacking = safe_int(s$rucks$attackingRuckEntries),
      ruck_entries_defensive = safe_int(s$rucks$defensiveRuckEntries),
      ruck_entries_total = safe_int(s$rucks$totalRuckEntries),
      ruck_nuisance = safe_int(s$rucks$nuisance),
      ruck_nuisance_jackal = safe_int(s$rucks$nuisanceJackal)
    )
  })
}
season_stats <- bind_rows(
  fetch_season_stats(URC_ID, "United Rugby Championship"),
  fetch_season_stats(CHAMPS_ID, "European Rugby Champions Cup")
)
refresh_table(con, "season_stats", season_stats)
log_count("season_stats", nrow(season_stats), table_row_count(con, "season_stats"))
```

```{r squad}
fetch_all_squads <- function(comp_id, comp_name) {
  team_ids <- bind_rows(
    matches |> filter(competition_id == comp_id) |> select(team_id = home_team_id, team_name = home_team),
    matches |> filter(competition_id == comp_id) |> select(team_id = away_team_id, team_name = away_team)
  ) |> distinct(team_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |> filter(!is.na(team_id))
  map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(team_ids)), function(i) {
    tid <- team_ids$team_id[i]; tname <- team_ids$team_name[i]
    squad_raw <- oval_get(glue("/team/{tid}"))
    if (is.null(squad_raw)) return(tibble())
    players_raw <- NULL
    if (!is.null(squad_raw$teams) && length(squad_raw$teams) > 0) players_raw <- squad_raw$teams[[1]]$squad
    if (is.null(players_raw)) players_raw <- squad_raw$players
    if (is.null(players_raw)) players_raw <- squad_raw$squad
    if (is.null(players_raw) || !is.list(players_raw) || length(players_raw) == 0) return(tibble())
    map_dfr(players_raw, function(p) {
      fn <- safe_chr(p$firstName); ln <- safe_chr(p$lastName)
      full_name <- if (!is.na(fn) && !is.na(ln)) paste(fn, ln) else coalesce(fn, ln, NA_character_)
      tibble(
        competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name, team_id = tid, team_name = tname,
        player_id = safe_int(p$id), player_name = full_name,
        known_name = safe_chr(p$knownName), first_name = fn, last_name = ln,
        position = if (is.list(p$normalPosition)) safe_chr(p$normalPosition$name) else safe_chr(p$normalPosition),
        gender = safe_chr(p$gender), date_of_birth = safe_chr(p$dob),
        birthplace = safe_chr(p$birthplace), country_of_birth = safe_chr(p$countryOfBirth),
        national_team = if (is.list(p$nationalTeam)) safe_chr(p$nationalTeam$name) else safe_chr(p$nationalTeam),
        height_cm = safe_int(p$height), weight_kg = safe_int(p$weight)
      )
    })
  })
}
squad <- bind_rows(
  fetch_all_squads(URC_ID,    "United Rugby Championship"),
  fetch_all_squads(CHAMPS_ID, "European Rugby Champions Cup")
) |> distinct(competition_id, team_id, player_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
refresh_table(con, "squad", squad)
log_count("squad", nrow(squad), table_row_count(con, "squad"))
```

```{r venues_officials}
fetch_venues <- function(comp_id, comp_name) {
  raw <- oval_get(glue("/venue/search?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}"))
  if (is.null(raw)) return(tibble())
  venues_raw <- if (!is.null(raw$venues)) raw$venues else raw
  map_dfr(venues_raw, function(v) {
    country_val <- if (is.list(v$country)) safe_chr(v$country$name) else safe_chr(v$country)
    country_id_val <- if (is.list(v$country)) safe_int(v$country$id) else NA_integer_
    tibble(
      competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name,
      venue_id = safe_int(v$id), venue_name = safe_chr(v$name), location = safe_chr(v$location),
      country_id = country_id_val, country = country_val, timezone = safe_chr(v$timezone),
      capacity = safe_int(v$capacity), roof = safe_chr(v$roof), surface = safe_chr(v$surface),
      year_built = safe_int(v$yearBuilt), latitude = safe_dbl(v$latitude), longitude = safe_dbl(v$longitude)
    )
  })
}
venues <- bind_rows(
  fetch_venues(URC_ID, "United Rugby Championship"),
  fetch_venues(CHAMPS_ID, "European Rugby Champions Cup")
) |> distinct(competition_id, venue_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
refresh_table(con, "venues", venues)
log_count("venues", nrow(venues), table_row_count(con, "venues"))

fetch_officials <- function(comp_id, comp_name) {
  raw <- oval_get(glue("/official/search?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}"))
  if (is.null(raw)) return(tibble())
  officials_raw <- if (!is.null(raw$officials)) raw$officials else raw
  map_dfr(officials_raw, function(o) {
    country_val <- if (is.list(o$country)) safe_chr(o$country$name) else safe_chr(o$country)
    tibble(
      competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name,
      official_id = safe_int(o$id), first_name = safe_chr(o$firstName),
      last_name = safe_chr(o$lastName), known_name = safe_chr(o$knownName),
      initials = safe_chr(o$initials), gender = safe_chr(o$gender),
      dob = safe_chr(o$dob), country = country_val
    )
  })
}
officials <- bind_rows(
  fetch_officials(URC_ID, "United Rugby Championship"),
  fetch_officials(CHAMPS_ID, "European Rugby Champions Cup")
) |> distinct(competition_id, official_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
refresh_table(con, "officials", officials)
log_count("officials", nrow(officials), table_row_count(con, "officials"))
```

```{r leaderboards}
stat_ids <- c(
  tries = "tryScored", points = "points", carries = "carries",
  metres_made = "carryMetresMade", metres_per_carry = "metresPerCarry",
  defenders_beaten = "defenderBeaten", try_assists = "tryAssist",
  tackles_made = "totalSuccessfulTackles", tackle_success = "tackleSuccessPercent",
  missed_tackles = "missedTackle", turnovers_won = "totalTurnoversWon",
  jackals = "totalJackals", lineout_throws = "lineoutThrowsWon",
  lineout_success = "lineoutSuccessPercent", kick_metres = "kickMetres",
  post_contact_metres = "postContactMetres", offloads = "offload",
  initial_breaks = "initialBreak"
)

player_top10_list <- list()
team_top_list     <- list()

for (comp_id in c(URC_ID, CHAMPS_ID)) {
  comp_name <- if (comp_id == URC_ID) "United Rugby Championship" else "European Rugby Champions Cup"
  for (stat_name in names(stat_ids)) {
    stat_str <- stat_ids[[stat_name]]
    # Player top 10
    raw <- oval_get(glue("/playertop10stats?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}&stat={stat_str}"))
    if (!is.null(raw) && !is.null(raw$stats)) {
      for (metric_type in c("total", "per80")) {
        metric_stats <- raw$stats[[metric_type]]
        if (is.null(metric_stats)) next
        players_raw <- metric_stats[[stat_str]]
        if (is.null(players_raw) || length(players_raw) == 0) next
        rows <- map_dfr(players_raw, function(p) tibble(
          competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name,
          stat_name = stat_name, stat_api_key = stat_str, metric_type = metric_type,
          rank = safe_int(p$rank), player_id = safe_int(p$playerId),
          player_name = safe_chr(p$playerName), team_id = safe_int(p$teamId),
          team_name = safe_chr(p$teamName), appearances = safe_int(p$appearances),
          minutes_played = safe_int(p$minutesPlayed), stat_value = safe_dbl(p$value)
        ))
        player_top10_list[[length(player_top10_list) + 1]] <- rows
      }
    }
    # Team top stats
    raw2 <- oval_get(glue("/teamtopstats?compId={comp_id}&seasonId={SEASON_ID}&stat={stat_str}"))
    if (!is.null(raw2) && !is.null(raw2$stats)) {
      for (metric_type in c("total", "perMatch")) {
        metric_stats <- raw2$stats[[metric_type]]
        if (is.null(metric_stats)) next
        teams_raw <- metric_stats[[stat_str]]
        if (is.null(teams_raw) || length(teams_raw) == 0) next
        rows <- map_dfr(teams_raw, function(t) tibble(
          competition_id = comp_id, competition = comp_name,
          stat_name = stat_name, stat_api_key = stat_str, metric_type = metric_type,
          rank = safe_int(t$rank), team_id = safe_int(t$teamId),
          team_name = safe_chr(t$teamName), stat_value = safe_dbl(t$value)
        ))
        team_top_list[[length(team_top_list) + 1]] <- rows
      }
    }
  }
}

player_top10   <- bind_rows(player_top10_list)
team_top_stats <- bind_rows(team_top_list)
refresh_table(con, "player_top10",   player_top10)
refresh_table(con, "team_top_stats", team_top_stats)
log_count("player_top10",   nrow(player_top10),   table_row_count(con, "player_top10"))
log_count("team_top_stats", nrow(team_top_stats), table_row_count(con, "team_top_stats"))
```

## Summary

```{r summary_table}
dbDisconnect(con)
elapsed <- round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")), 1)

summary_df <- tibble(
  Table                = names(counts),
  `New rows added`     = sapply(counts, `[[`, "new"),
  `Total rows in DB`   = sapply(counts, `[[`, "total")
)
knitr::kable(summary_df, format = "html")
```

**Run completed in `r elapsed` minutes at `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")`.**
